data.body: Scope expansion: This story owns cleanup of ALL Bandit references across the codebase, not just INSTALL.md and README. The 15 files referencing Bandit include: examples/ci.example.yml (owned by 4c44-9805), plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md (owned by c9aa-abda), and remaining files (CLAUDE.md, .test-index, agents/code-reviewer-security-red-team.md, docs/reference/system-landscape.md, llms.txt, examples/pre-commit-config.example.yaml, tests/*, hooks/*). Each implementation story removes Bandit references within its own scope. This docs story removes references in ALL remaining files not covered by other stories.
